title: sorghum technicum
intro: Sorghum technicum, also known as broomcorn sorghum or durra, is a species of flowering plant in the sorghum genus, characterized by its tall stature and panicles of small, grain-like flowers. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, sorghum technicum has been found to possess anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support immune function. Sorghum technicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
